Records.description: The integrals in this paper are given as analytic functions in $d$ dimensions, so that all orders in $\varepsilon$ are covered. The common prefactor to all integrals is $(4\pi)^{(4 - d)/2} (\Gamma(3 - d/2) \Gamma^2(d/2 - 1))/\Gamma(d - 3)$. Be aware that all these integrals have at least one off-shell leg.

Results.resultTeXPreview: \frac{\log \left(M_2^{-2} M_3^2\right)}{\varepsilon^2 \left(2 M_2^2-2 M_3^2\right)}+\frac{-H\left(0,\frac{M_2^2}{M_2^2-M_3^2}\,;1\right)+\log ^2\left(M_2^{-2} M_3^2\right)-2 \log \left(M_3^2\right) \log \left(M_2^{-2} M_3^2\right)-2 i \pi  \log \left(M_2^{-2} M_3^2\right)+2 \log \left(M_2^{-2} M_3^2\right)}{2 \varepsilon \left(M_2^2-M_3^2\right)}+\frac{6 i \pi  H\left(0,\frac{M_2^2}{M_2^2-M_3^2}\,;1\right)-6 H\left(0,\frac{M_2^2}{M_2^2-M_3^2}\,;1\right)+3 H\left(0,0,\frac{M_2^2}{M_2^2-M_3^2}\,;1\right)-6 H\left(0,\frac{M_2^2}{M_2^2-M_3^2},\frac{M_2^2}{M_2^2-M_3^2}\,;1\right)-6 H\left(\frac{M_2^2}{M_2^2-M_3^2},0,\frac{M_2^2}{M_2^2-M_3^2}\,;1\right)+6 \log \left(M_3^2\right) H\left(0,\frac{M_2^2}{M_2^2-M_3^2}\,;1\right)-3 \zeta(2) \log \left(M_2^{-2} M_3^2\right)+2 \log ^3\left(M_2^{-2} M_3^2\right)-6 \log \left(M_3^2\right) \log ^2\left(M_2^{-2} M_3^2\right)-6 i \pi  \log ^2\left(M_2^{-2} M_3^2\right)+6 \log ^2\left(M_2^{-2} M_3^2\right)+6 \log ^2\left(M_3^2\right) \log \left(M_2^{-2} M_3^2\right)+12 i \pi  \log \left(M_3^2\right) \log \left(M_2^{-2} M_3^2\right)-12 \log \left(M_3^2\right) \log \left(M_2^{-2} M_3^2\right)-6 \pi ^2 \log \left(M_2^{-2} M_3^2\right)-12 i \pi  \log \left(M_2^{-2} M_3^2\right)+12 \log \left(M_2^{-2} M_3^2\right)}{6 \left(M_2^2-M_3^2\right)}+O\left(\varepsilon^1\right)
